components.name: HeroArticleCard
components.reasoning: The large top card with 'On Creative Constraints' - merging the container and all child regions (image, title, text, metadata). This is the featured article with geometric background.

components.name: ArticleCardSmall
components.reasoning: Second card showing 'The Power of Simplicity' - smaller format with thumbnail image on left, text on right. This pattern repeats for list items.

components.name: ArticleCardSmall
components.reasoning: Third card showing 'Building in Public' - same pattern as above card. Second instance of the repeating article card pattern.

components.name: HeaderNav
components.reasoning: Top navigation bar with 'Meditations' title and Blog/Explore tabs. Standard app header pattern.

components.name: BottomNavBar
components.reasoning: Bottom navigation with explore, meditations, and browse icons. Standard mobile bottom tab bar.
